segments.text: I build AI systems that help companies automate decisions and operations.
Right now I'm working on platforms that combine AI agents, governance, and real-time execution systems.
My focus is not ideas — it's building working systems that can be used in real companies, especially in compliance, automation, and infrastructure.
If you're building in this space or investing in it, I'm open to connect.

trustfield_social_v1.full_text: Canadian MSBs face RPAA registration pressure now. TrustField gives you a live sandbox — intake, operator workflows, and audit exports your MLRO can review. Book a demo at trustfield.ca.

noetfield_social_v1.full_text: Copilot agents execute across your tenant. Policy violated. Execution stopped. Noetfield adds governance at dispatch with verification built in. Design partner calls — operations@noetfield.com.
